---
title: "DWH Process Consulting, LLC"
sidebar: false
---

<!-- ::: {.column-page-right} -->

# Bio/Chemical Process Engineering Consulting

::: {style="text-align: center;"}
![](./images/logo2026.svg){width=200px}
:::

::: {style="text-align: center; font-size: 1.3em;"}
Dave Humbird, PhD, PE

Denver, Colorado, USA
:::
---

## About
DWH Process Consulting provides conceptual process design, simulation, and techno-economic analysis expertise to research institutions and startups. DWH also supports technical due diligence for commercial and philanthropic investors. Target sectors include renewable fuels/chemicals/power, industrial biotechnology, olefins and specialty chemicals, refinery and heavy industry decarbonization, CO2 capture, and fermented/distilled beverages.

---

## Expertise and Services Offered

### Process Simulation
* Aspen Plus - Aspen Custom Modeler - HYSYS
* Physical property fitting and estimation
* Distillation design and optimization

### Techno-Economic Analysis
* Conceptual process design - Heat and material balances - BFDs and PFDs
* Preliminary equipment sizing + Aspen Capital Cost Estimator 


### Scientific Computing
* Excel + VBA power user
* Occasional use of Python for data analysis and visualization
* Past experience with C++, computational fluid dynamics, molecular dynamics, data science and machine learning

---

## Typical Project Descriptions
* Chemical engineering simulation subject matter expert: reactor and distillation modeling, physical property development, and capital cost estimation. DWH carries a license for the AspenTech products named above.
* Sustainability modeling specialist, delivering flowsheet simulations and physical modeling for renewable power, biomass conversion, hydrogen economy, CO2 capture, desalination, and other processes.
* Techno-economic analysis for early-stage (TRL 1-3) process-industry startups.
* Technical due diligence analysis for sustainability investors and philanthropic organizations.
* Training and mentoring engineering staff to grow in-house simulation and analysis skills.

---

## Contact DWH Process Consulting

```{r, echo=FALSE}
htmltools::includeHTML("contactfrag.html")
```

---

## Connect

Find me on:
- **ORCID:** [0000-0002-7885-1871](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-7885-1871)
- **GitHub:** [@dhumbird](https://github.com/dhumbird)
- **LinkedIn:** [Dave Humbird, PhD, PE](https://www.linkedin.com/in/dave-humbird-0455a249/)

<!-- ::: -->
